name: Palmetto Kidz SCHL Shuttle LLC
districts_or_customers: Columbia, SC families; transport to school, aftercare and daycare
recent_news: None found. Listed on Care.com and Nextdoor as a small kids-shuttle LLC; no M&A or growth news.
website: palmettokss.com (per source list; palmettokidz.com appears to be an unrelated fundraising entity)
fit_notes: Sub-scale (3 employees, ~$126K revenue) micro-shuttle service for kids — too small to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in. Not a yellow-bus contractor; not strategic.

name: Old School Shuttles
fleet_size_est: small mixed fleet (shuttles, vans, black cars)
districts_or_customers: Austin, TX events, corporate/C-suite clients, airport and winery tours — NOT a school-district contractor
recent_news: No M&A news. Operates as OSS LUX boutique transport brand in Austin.
fit_notes: NOT a school-bus operator despite the name — it is a charter/limo/black-car service. BBB-listed under 'limo service.' Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Door 2 Door School Shuttle LLC
owner_or_parent: independent (Carl W. Garlington per state records)
districts_or_customers: Private-pay families in The Colony / north Dallas metro; not a yellow-bus district contractor — geo-tracked individualized shuttle to school, daycare, sports
recent_news: None found. Profiled on Yelp/Nextdoor/Alignable as a small operator; positive reviews for reliability.
fit_notes: Micro-scale private-pay shuttle (~$908K rev, 4 employees) in Dallas metro — too small for a meaningful Summit tuck-in and lacks district contracts. Pass.

name: Castro School Trnsprtn Inc
districts_or_customers: Likely Garfield/Bergen-Passaic NJ districts; possibly approved NJ DOE contracted carrier (Castro Transport LLC appears in FMCSA SAFER). Specific district contracts not confirmed.
recent_news: None found. FMCSA SAFER shows a Castro Transport LLC registration; no M&A activity.
fit_notes: Small NJ family-owned school contractor (~9 employees, ~$491K rev). NJ is a fragmented sub-contractor market (Summit/National Express plays here). Possibly addable as a micro tuck-in but very small; likely lacks district prime contracts. Borderline.

name: Chool Bus
districts_or_customers: Cedar Hill / South Dallas metro; no confirmed district contracts. Cedar Hill ISD runs its own in-house transportation per district website.
recent_news: None found. No web presence beyond directory listings.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (~$485K rev, 9 employees) Dallas-area shuttle with no district prime contracts (Cedar Hill ISD self-operates). Not a viable Summit tuck-in. Pass.
